description: Letter addressed to Sitt al-Khayr. It seems that the writer had learned that Sitt al-Khayr's daughter was going to get married and expresses her expectation in the letter to receive an invitation. (Information from Goitein's index cards)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
